description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. This two-hole lace up suede shoe references the conservative derby in its styling. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with rugged belts.UpperTwo-tone leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heelStitches on the seams of the toe boxTwo-hole lace upPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guardShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
